title: Year Guesser: Sports History
description: Guess the year of iconic sports moments

questions.question: When were the first modern Olympic Games held?
questions.explanation: The first modern Olympics were held in Athens, Greece in 1896.

questions.question: When did Usain Bolt set the 100m world record (9.58s)?
questions.explanation: Bolt ran 9.58 seconds at the 2009 World Championships in Berlin.

questions.question: When was the first FIFA World Cup held?
questions.explanation: The first World Cup was held in Uruguay in 1930.

questions.question: When did Michael Jordan first retire from basketball?
questions.explanation: Jordan announced his first retirement on October 6, 1993.

questions.question: When did Muhammad Ali light the Olympic cauldron in Atlanta?
questions.explanation: Ali lit the cauldron at the 1996 Atlanta Summer Olympics opening ceremony.

questions.question: When did Leicester City win the Premier League?
questions.explanation: Leicester City won the 2015–16 Premier League, one of sports' greatest upsets.

questions.question: When did Tiger Woods win his first Masters Tournament?
questions.explanation: Tiger Woods won the 1997 Masters by 12 strokes at age 21.

questions.question: When was the first Super Bowl played?
questions.explanation: Super Bowl I was played on January 15, 1967. The Green Bay Packers won.

questions.question: When did Nadia Comăneci score the first perfect 10 in Olympic gymnastics?
questions.explanation: Comăneci scored the first perfect 10 at the 1976 Montreal Olympics.

questions.question: When did Spain win their first FIFA World Cup?
questions.explanation: Spain won the 2010 World Cup in South Africa, beating the Netherlands 1-0.

questions.question: When did Roger Bannister run the first sub-4-minute mile?
questions.explanation: Bannister ran a mile in 3:59.4 on May 6, 1954 in Oxford.

questions.question: When did LeBron James enter the NBA?
questions.explanation: LeBron was the first overall pick in the 2003 NBA Draft by the Cleveland Cavaliers.

questions.question: When did the 'Miracle on Ice' happen at the Winter Olympics?
questions.explanation: The US hockey team upset the Soviet Union at the 1980 Lake Placid Winter Olympics.

questions.question: When did Serena Williams win her first Grand Slam title?
questions.explanation: Serena won the 1999 US Open at age 17.

questions.question: When did the Chicago Cubs break their 108-year World Series drought?
questions.explanation: The Cubs won the 2016 World Series, their first title since 1908.
